name: Morgan Stanley Depositary Shares each representing 1/1000th of a share of 6.625% Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock Series Q
summary: Morgan Stanley Depositary Shares each representing 1/1000th of a share of 6.625% Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock Series Q represents a fractional interest in Morgan Stanley's preferred stock. These Series Q preferred shares pay a fixed dividend of 6.625%. The dividends are non-cumulative, implying that unpaid dividends do not accumulate.
